title: AP Is Naxal-free State, Declares DGP
description: The DGP said that several Naxalites had surrendered before the police following the Centre's warning. Speaking to mediapersons on Monday, he said that nine Maoists, including Narayana Rao, laid down their arms. Those arrested include Podiyam Raje, Kartam Adame, Mucchika Maasa, Madavi Jogi, Mucchika Lakshman, Kaditi Hurre
